page_title: List of Attack on Titan: No Regrets chapters
text:
__NOTOC__

This is a list containing all the chapters from the Attack on Titan: No Regrets manga series.

Complete Color Edition

Trivia

Kodansha Comics USA has decided to release the English version of the Complete Color Edition in a 2-in-1 format.
